name: vibin
description: Workflow, repo, GitHub, Windows, Paperless, MCP gateway, Jetpack Compose, and SWAG utility skills.

settings.name: Paperless API Token
settings.description: Paperless-ngx API token used in the Authorization: Token header.

settings.name: Paperless URL
settings.description: Base URL of the Paperless-ngx instance, including scheme. Do not include a trailing slash.

settings.name: SWAG container name
settings.description: Container name used for nginx validation and logs. Default: 'swag'.

settings.name: SWAG default auth method
settings.description: Default auth include set for new configs, such as authelia, authentik, tinyauth, ldap, or none. Default: 'authelia'.

settings.name: SWAG default QUIC setting
settings.description: Default QUIC/HTTP3 setting for new configs. Default: 'false'.

settings.name: SWAG default upstream protocol
settings.description: Default upstream protocol for new configs. Default: 'http'.

settings.name: SWAG edge SSH host
settings.description: SSH host that owns the SWAG appdata/config directory.

settings.name: SWAG proxy-confs path
settings.description: Host path to the SWAG nginx/proxy-confs directory.

settings.name: SWAG public base domain
settings.description: Base domain used for generated subdomains, such as example.com.

settings.name: SWAG reload wait seconds
settings.description: Seconds to wait for SWAG filewatch reload before health checks. Default: '30'.
